query:
SELECT 
  SUBSTRING(drawTime, 12, 2) as hour,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM draw_records
WHERE drawTime LIKE '115/03/15 %'
GROUP BY hour
ORDER BY hour;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3EvX9rH8vJHs1LE.34486a3ccb4b --database kTdJcS62GUwid3zgDEGkMA --execute SELECT 
  SUBSTRING(drawTime, 12, 2) as hour,
  COUNT(*) as count
